title: File preview in email notification

Description
When someone comments on a file, I’d like to see a preview of that file in the email notification I get about the activity. Currently, it just shows the filename.

posts.author: asacederholm (Åsa Cederholm)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When someone comments on a file, I’d like to see a preview of that file in the email notification I get about the activity. Currently, it just shows the filename.

What are you trying to achieve

Gain context for comments on files.
